body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now bears a matte charcoal-gray skin texture with subtle shadow violet undertones, while the pointed ears gain jagged, tattered edges and a faint obsidian silver sheen at the tips. The flower-like structure on top transforms into a dense, shadowy cluster of jagged black petals with ebony crimson veins, their edges slightly translucent. Leaf patterns on the body become deep-set, spiky dark fur patterns in charcoal and shadow violet, merging seamlessly with the skin texture. The curled spiral tail tip now features a matte black scale texture with shadow violet cracks and obsidian silver highlights along its spiral curve.
signature_feature: Flower-like structure: shadowy cluster of jagged black petals with ebony crimson veins and obsidian silver edges.
